hero.title: Craft Your Perfect Experience
hero.subtitle: Private yacht escapes, cinematic sunsets and curated experiences on the hidden side of the Italian Riviera.

step1.title: Tell us your vision
step1.description: Share your travel dates, group size and the kind of atmosphere you're looking for. Every journey starts with your idea.

step2.title: We curate everything
step2.description: We personally select the finest experiences, trusted local partners and hidden places to create a proposal tailored exclusively to you.

step3.title: Receive Your Private Proposal
step3.description: In less than a minute, discover a curated proposal tailored to your vision, complete with experiences, pricing and optional enhancements.

manifesto.title: The Italian Riviera you imagined still exists.
manifesto.description: We curate private Mediterranean experiences designed around atmosphere, storytelling, intimacy and authentic human connection.

scarcity.title: Small private groups. Selected experiences only.
scarcity.description: Every production is intentionally limited to preserve exclusivity, atmosphere and emotional impact.

finalCta.title: Your Private Riviera Awaits
finalCta.description: Answer a few questions about your dates, your group and the mood you're after — receive a tailored proposal in minutes, complete with pricing and hand-picked experiences.

intro.title: Craft Your Mediterranean Escape
intro.subtitle: Answer a few questions to receive a curated proposal tailored to your ideal Riviera experience.

experiences.label: Select up to 3 Experiences
experiences.title: What kind of experience are you dreaming of?

moods.label: Select up to 3 Atmospheres
moods.title: Choose the vibe that inspires you.

dates.label: Travel Dates
dates.title: When are you planning to travel?

budget.label: Estimated Investment
budget.title: What is your preferred budget range?

contact.label: Your Details
contact.title: One last step before we craft your proposal.

dates.dragHint: Tap a date, or drag across dates to select a range.

contact.termsSuffix: and understand that reservation deposits may be required to secure curated experiences.

proposal.errorFallback: We couldn't load this proposal correctly. Please contact us directly.

hero.label: Private Riviera Proposal
hero.subtitle: Tailored for {guestSentence} across curated Riviera experiences, cinematic atmosphere and Mediterranean moments.

narrative.label: Mediterranean Luxury
narrative.title: Designed Around Your Riviera Escape
narrative.description: Every proposal is curated around atmosphere, pace, scenery and personal preferences, creating a private Mediterranean experience designed exclusively for you.

reservation.label: Private Reservation
reservation.title: Your Riviera Experience Awaits
reservation.description: Your curated proposal has been privately reserved for a limited time, allowing you to confirm your Riviera experience in complete exclusivity.

floatingBar.thankYouVerified: Thank you, {name} — your email has been confirmed. We'll be in touch shortly to finalize your private booking.
floatingBar.checkInbox: Check your inbox — we've sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click it to complete your booking request.
floatingBar.genericError: Something went wrong — please try again, or contact us directly.

shareButton.shareText: Here's your curated private Riviera experience.
